name: raw_access_thread_susp_disk_access_using_uncommon_tools
raw_query: any where (not (file.path:"*floppy*" or (process.executable like~ ("C:\\$WINDOWS.~BT\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\*", "C:\\Windows\\CCM\\*", "C:\\Windows\\explorer.exe*", "C:\\Windows\\servicing\\*", "C:\\Windows\\SoftwareDistribution\\*", "C:\\Windows\\System32\\*", "C:\\Windows\\SystemApps\\*", "C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\*", "C:\\Windows\\uus\\*", "C:\\Windows\\WinSxS\\*")) or (process.executable like~ ("Registry", "System")) or (process.executable:"C:\\ProgramData\\Microsoft\\Windows Defender\\Platform\\*" and (process.executable like~ ("*\\MsMpEng.exe", "*\\MpDefenderCoreService.exe"))) or (process.executable:"C:\\Users\\*" and (process.executable:"*\\AppData\\*" and process.executable:"*\\Microsoft\\*")) or (process.executable:"C:\\Windows\\Temp\\*" and (process.executable like~ ("*\\Executables\\SSDUpdate.exe", "*\\HostMetadata\\NVMEHostmetadata.exe"))) or (?process.executable == null) or process.executable:"C:\\Windows\\ImmersiveControlPanel\\SystemSettings.exe" or process.executable:"C:\\$WinREAgent\\Scratch\\*")) and (not ((process.executable:"C:\\Users\\*" and process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\GitHubDesktop\\app-*" and process.executable:"*\\resources\\app\\git\\mingw64\\bin\\git.exe") or (process.executable:"C:\\Windows\\Temp\\asgard2-agent\\*" and process.executable:"*\\thor.exe") or (process.executable:"C:\\Users\\*" and process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Keybase\\upd.exe*")))
